nasb.text: But now finish doing it also, so that just as there was the readiness to desire it, so there may be also the completion of it by your ability.

esv.text: So now finish doing it as well, so that your readiness in desiring it may be matched by your completing it out of what you have.

cnv.text: 現在就應當把這事辦好；這樣，你們既然有願意作的心，因著你們盡了自己所能的，就可以完成。

ccb.text: 你们现在要把它完成。你们既有恳切愿意的心，就要有始有终。

csbs.text: 所以现在你们就当完成这事，好使你们怎样有愿做的乐意之心，就怎样以你们所拥有的完成它；
